keywords: nonRepudiationAudit append-only storeDocument prevHash hash chain PII scrub card number CVV deleteDocument updateDocument prohibited audit trail legal compliance CF-16-9
ironRules: nonRepudiationAudit index is APPEND-ONLY — storeDocument insert only, no updateDocument, no deleteDocument
Every audit record MUST include prevHash referencing prior record — forms cryptographic chain
PII MUST be scrubbed before storeDocument — no bankAccountNumber, card number, CVV, full PAN
Only last4 of card, masked fields, and non-sensitive identifiers permitted in audit records
Audit chain integrity verifiable by computing hash(record) and comparing with next.prevHash
